question: Give the average, minimum, and maximum distances between two cities.
sql: SELECT AVG(distance) AS average_distance, MIN(distance) AS minimum_distance, MAX(distance) AS maximum_distance FROM Direct_distance;

back_translation.intent: 计算距离的平均值、最小值和最大值

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求计算两个城市间距离的平均值、最小值和最大值，SQL反向翻译描述准确对应了该意图，使用了正确的表和列，并包含完整的聚合函数（AVG, MIN, MAX）且无额外过滤/分组/排序限制，与问题语义完全一致。
